name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the target variable (from G_vrh to Pugh's ratio), the feature engineering approach (new indicators, different features), the model architecture (ensemble vs. multi-task with uncertainty weights), and the interpretability method (SHAP vs. MC sensitivity). Because the core data processing and modeling strategy have fundamentally shifted, none of the previous steps can be reused.
